name: Jadeware Effect
description: Casting a Martial Art Skill increases Affinity DMG by 10% and Affinity Rate by 7.5% (conditional)
notes: Condition: targets with lower Qi% than you or below 40% Qi. Lasts 8s; triggers once every 12s.

name: Food Buff (Physical Attack)
description: Food buff: increases Min Physical Attack by 50 and Max Physical Attack by 100.

name: Hawkwing Set (4/4)
description: When any of your damage triggers Affinity, gain Hawkwing: increases Physical Attack by 2% for 5s, stacking up to 5 times (conditional)
notes: Modeling note: Hawkwing stacks up to 5x (+2% Physical Attack each, max +10%). This calculator models it as a single +10% Physical Attack boost and applies passive uptime as an averaging knob. To approximate average stacks, set uptime to (avgStacks/5)*100 (e.g. ~3 stacks avg -> 60%). Actual uptime depends on how often you trigger Affinity and the 5s buff duration.

name: Stars Align Set (4/4)
description: When hitting at least 2 enemies simultaneously, or hitting a boss/player, gain Stars Align for 5s. Martial Art Skills deal 3% increased damage per stack, up to 5 stacks.
notes: Modeling note: stacks are modeled at full 5 stacks (+15% Martial Art Skill damage), then weighted by passive uptime. The distance-based bonus portion from the game tooltip is not modeled.

name: Sword Qi Affinity Enhancement
description: Increases Affinity DMG based on Max Physical Attack (up to 18% at 1500 Max Physical Attack)
notes: Condition: sword energy attacks against targets with Qi below 40% (including Exhausted targets).

name: Affinity DMG UP
description: Increases Affinity DMG based on Affinity Rate (up to 18% at 30% Affinity Rate)
notes: Condition: when Endurance is below 60%.

name: Affinity Rate UP (Momentum, included in stats)
description: Increases Affinity Rate based on Momentum. This bonus is assumed to already be included in the in-game displayed stats you input; enabling this passive only affects Stat Impact calculations.
notes: Model: bonus = min(Momentum, 175) * 0.04 (cap represented via max=175 on the source stat). Toggle affects Stat Impact only to avoid double counting when your inputs already include this bonus.

name: Max Physical Attack UP (Momentum, included in stats)
description: Increases Max Physical Attack based on Momentum. This bonus is assumed to already be included in the in-game displayed stats you input; enabling this passive only affects Stat Impact calculations.
notes: Model: bonus = min(Momentum, 175) * 0.9 (cap represented via max=175 on the source stat). Toggle affects Stat Impact only to avoid double counting when your inputs already include this bonus.

name: Shadow Affinity
description: Increases Affinity Rate by 8%

name: Dark Strike
description: Increases Critical DMG Bonus by 20%

name: Flow Mastery
description: Increases Agility-based defense by 12%
notes: Scales with Agility

name: Precision Enhancement
description: Increases Precision Rate by 15%

name: Stone Defense
description: Increases Physical Defense by 20%

name: Crushing Power
description: Increases Physical Attack by 18%

name: Armor Penetration
description: Adds 8 to Physical Penetration

name: Swift Strike
description: Increases Agility-based damage by 15%
notes: Scales with Agility

name: Windfall Momentum
description: Increases Momentum by 10

name: Wind Affinity
description: Increases Affinity Rate by 12%

name: Bamboocut Mastery
description: Deal damage based on Attribute Attack, while Bamboocut Attack deals 50% bonus damage

name: Wrathful Power
description: Increases Critical Rate by 10% and Critical DMG Bonus by 20% during Flamelash state
notes: Active during Flamelash burst skill

name: Jadebreak
description: Increases Projectile skill damage by 30%. When a Projectile Skill or Heavy Attack Pursuit skill hits a Boss unit, deals 10% more damage. This effect lasts 15 seconds.
notes: Modeling note: the +10% is a boss-triggered 15s buff. This calculator approximates it as an uptime-weighted bonus; set passive uptime to reflect expected boss buff uptime. The +30% projectile damage is always-on (not uptime-weighted).

name: Spring Shock
description: During the effect's duration, the stamina cost and damage dealt by charged skills are increased by 4%. Lasts for 15 seconds and can stack up to 5 times.
notes: Modeling note: Spring Shock stacks up to 5x (+4% each). This calculator models only the charged-skill damage part as a single +20% boost and applies passive uptime as an averaging knob. To approximate average stacks, set uptime to (avgStacks/5)*100 (e.g. ~3 stacks avg -> 60%). Stamina cost is not currently modeled in the damage formulas/UI.

name: Trajectory Calculation Enhancement
description: Increases the Critical DMG of all Vernal Umbrella ballistic skills by 2.4% for every 50 Min Physical Attack (up to 36% increase at 750 Min Physical Attack).
notes: Applies only when the skill is tagged as ballistic AND weaponType is Umbrella (handled in createSkillContext).

name: Heavy Attack Pursuit Enhancement
description: Increases the Critical DMG of Heavy Attack Pursuit Moon Shatter Spring by 2.4% for every 50 Min Physical Attack, up to 36% increase at 750 Min Physical Attack.
notes: Applies only for the Moonlit Shatter Spring pursuit skills (handled in createSkillContext by skill id).

name: Physical Attack UP (Agility, included in stats)
description: Increases Min Physical Attack based on Agility. This bonus is assumed to already be included in the in-game displayed stats you input; enabling this passive only affects Stat Impact calculations.
notes: Model: bonus = min(Agility, 175) * 0.2635714286 (cap represented via max=175 on the source stat). Toggle affects Stat Impact only to avoid double counting when your inputs already include this bonus.

name: Critical Rate UP (Agility, included in stats)
description: Increases Critical Rate based on Agility. This bonus is assumed to already be included in the in-game displayed stats you input; enabling this passive only affects Stat Impact calculations.
notes: Model: bonus = min(Agility, 175) * 0.03 (cap represented via max=175 on the source stat). Toggle affects Stat Impact only to avoid double counting when your inputs already include this bonus.

name: Soul Loss/Soulbreak
description: At 7 stacks, Soul Loss transforms into Soulbreak. Targets affected by Soulbreak take 5% more Qi damage and 5% more damage from the applier.
notes: Modeling note: Soulbreak target-state effect.

name: Soulbreak Critical Boost
description: Increases Critical DMG dealt to enemies affected by Soulbreak based on Critical Rate, up to 27% increase at 60% Critical Rate.
notes: Model: bonus = min(CriticalRate * 0.45, 27). Applies to Soulbreak-affected targets.

name: Critical Rate UP (Agility, included in stats)
description: Increases Critical Rate based on Agility. This bonus is assumed to already be included in the in-game displayed stats you input; enabling this passive only affects Stat Impact calculations.
notes: Model: bonus = min(Agility, 175) * 0.03 (cap represented via max=175 on the source stat). Toggle affects Stat Impact only to avoid double counting when your inputs already include this bonus.

name: Physical Attack UP (Agility, included in stats)
description: Increases Min Physical Attack based on Agility. This bonus is assumed to already be included in the in-game displayed stats you input; enabling this passive only affects Stat Impact calculations.
notes: Model: bonus = min(Agility, 175) * 0.264 (cap represented via max=175 on the source stat). Toggle affects Stat Impact only to avoid double counting when your inputs already include this bonus.

name: Returning Umbrella DMG UP
description: Increases the Physical Damage of Martial Art Skill's spinning umbrella based on Min Physical Attack, up to 15% increase at 750 Min Physical Attack.
notes: Model: bonus = min(MinPhysicalAttack * 0.02, 15).

name: Charged Combo Enhancement
description: Each Token of Gratitude increases the max combo count of Piercing Dart. Modeled effect: every 4th hit of Scarlet Spin is treated as guaranteed Critical when this passive is active.
notes: Modeling approximation per request: every 3 Scarlet Spin hits, the 4th hit is auto crit (applied as an expected-value bonus across rotation hit cycles).
